author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Turtwig, Chimchar, and Piplup Arrive! | Pokémon Sleep 3rd Anniversary 🎉
Turtwig, Chimchar, and Piplup are arriving on Monday, July 13, 2026. Here's a special video featuring these three Pokémon to celebrate the third anniversary! 🎉

#Turtwig #Chimchar #Piplup

Pokémon Sleep is currently available for smartphones: https://app.adjust.com/1nrzhge0
Official Webpage: https://www.pokemonsleep.net/en/
X Account: https://x.com/PokemonSleep

Find all your favorite Pokémon merchandise at the official Pokémon Center: https://www.pokemoncenter.com/

Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/pokemon
